scripts.db:migrate:local: wrangler d1 execute copta-db --local --file=./migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute copta-db --local --file=./migrations/0002_auth_sessions.sql && wrangler d1 execute copta-db --local --file=./migrations/0003_officer_chat.sql
scripts.db:migrate:remote: wrangler d1 execute copta-db --remote --file=./migrations/0001_init.sql && wrangler d1 execute copta-db --remote --file=./migrations/0002_auth_sessions.sql && wrangler d1 execute copta-db --remote --file=./migrations/0003_officer_chat.sql
scripts.db:setup:local: npm run db:migrate:local && npm run db:seed:poc
